name: Will I lose my job if I report chemical exposure at work?

mainEntity.name: Will I lose my job if I report chemical exposure at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Retaliation illegal; document and report to OSHA[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, retaliation for safety reports or claims is illegal under OSHA and state law.** Employers can't fire or punish you[1][3]. **Key factors:** Document threats, file OSHA complaint if occurs. **Practical guidance:** Report in writing, keep records. Consult attorney if pressured. **Protection exists but prove retaliation.**

description: Retaliation illegal; document and report to OSHA[1].
